results.check_summary: Odd-position terms have successive even increments; even-position terms alternate 9 and -7.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: quadratic odd stream and alternating even stream.

results.check_summary: Six-position phase streams continue consistently across the full prefix.
The latest growing arithmetic blocks have steps increasing by four; the next block continues with step 19.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with increasing block starts, steps, and lengths.

results.check_summary: Residue-class streams provide the best-supported continuation among the proposals.
The proposed continuation best matches the observed multi-stream phase structure.
Distinct interleaved streams explain the periodic values and rapidly growing alternating phase.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE of periodic, polynomial, and affine streams.

results.check_summary: Growing-block continuation is weakly identified but best supported by the candidate evidence.
Odd-position terms decrease by one and even-position terms decrease by four exactly.
This continuation best fits the proposed multi-stream interleaving pattern.
Positive jumps increase by five while intervening terms decrease by five.
results.rule_summary: Periodic difference rule with positive jumps 3, 8, 13, 18, 23.

results.check_summary: Three interleaved streams are continued from their observed phase increments.
The next growing block has start 189 and step -17, following the block-step progression.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with polynomial starts and linearly changing negative steps.
